description_long: This is a modern, geometric shelving unit with a stepped, asymmetrical design. The structure is primarily composed of white panels, forming two open rectangular compartments, one above the other, offset horizontally. The middle section features a contrasting wood-toned back panel, adding visual interest and depth to the design. The open compartments are suitable for displaying books, decor, or small urban items, making it ideal for use in public spaces, lobbies, or contemporary urban interiors. The surfaces appear smooth and hard, with clean, sharp edges and a minimalist aesthetic. There are no visible doors, handles, or glass panels, emphasizing its open and accessible nature.
description: A modern, stepped white shelving unit with open rectangular compartments and a wood-toned accent panel. Its clean, minimalist design is ideal for displaying items in urban spaces.
description_view_0: Front view showing two open rectangular compartments and a wood-toned back panel in the middle.
description_view_1: Side view revealing the stepped profile and solid white panels, with no openings visible.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the solid white back and the offset structure, with no open compartments visible.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, similar to view 1, showing the stepped profile and solid panels.
